title: paspalum goyanum
intro: Paspalum goyanum, also known as Paspalum, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paspalum goyanum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Paspalum goyanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues.
